title: Subitem Groups and Names
excerpt: It would be nice to have the capability to build groups of subitems for an item, so we can easily organize subitems into different groups.  For example, if I have a project, where one group of subitems is a list of miles…

posts.author: cia.hang.mychapter (Cia Hang)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have the capability to build groups of subitems for an item, so we can easily organize subitems into different groups. For example, if I have a project, where one group of subitems is a list of milestones, I would also like to create a group of subitems for a list of risks. It would also be ideal if we could name the different types of subgroups.
